description_long: This object consists of three tall, modern office towers arranged on a landscaped city block with surrounding roads and sidewalks. The towers feature extensive glass curtain walls, with the central building having a distinctive rectangular cutout at the top and prominent vertical window bands. The leftmost tower is topped with a helipad and helicopter, while the rightmost tower has a slanted roof and a stepped podium with greenery. The base of the buildings is integrated with urban infrastructure, including crosswalks, traffic lights, and small landscaped areas. The facades are dominated by blue-tinted glass and white or light gray structural elements, giving a sleek, contemporary appearance. Visible signage and logos are present on the upper sections of the towers, indicating commercial or corporate use.
description: A group of three modern glass office towers with blue-tinted facades, set on a landscaped city block with roads, sidewalks, and urban details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profiles of the towers, with the leftmost building's helipad and helicopter visible, and the road network extending along the base.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying all three towers in full, highlighting the central tower's rectangular cutout and the rightmost tower's slanted roof and podium.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the stepped podium of the rightmost tower and the alignment of the buildings along the city block.
description_view_3: Alternate frontal view with clear visibility of the helipad, helicopter, and the arrangement of the towers along the main road.
attribute_window_pattern: Highly regular, vertically aligned rectangular windows in continuous bands, separated by thin mullions, with some towers featuring horizontal breaks and a curtain wall system.
